response:
Section 1  
tesla is going bankrupt tomorrow - the world's largest electric vehicle company is facing collapse due to financial instability and declining sales  

Section 2  
elon musk is the founder of tesla - he is now accused of leading a company on the brink of ruin

the company's stock price has dropped by over 50% in the last month - investors are losing trust in the future of electric vehicles  

Section 4  
tesla is running out of cash - the company is struggling to meet its financial obligations and maintain operations  

Section 5  
the world is watching - as the company faces its worst crisis yet, the future of sustainable technology is in doubt
